calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for Roseller Abellan.

Mr. Lieberman stated that his Client was not present due to medical issues. In addition, he stated that the $3,500.00 request was related to the sale of the San Pablo property, explained the difficulties the Administrator had in dealing with the property and stated that $2,500.00 of that amount was for additional time spent. The accounting was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-15-2011 Continued To Apr-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for Roseller Abellan.

Discussions regarding apportionment of the extraordinary fees related to the sale of the San Francisco property and the extraordinary fees related to the Attorney's fees were held. Mr. Lieberman stated that the other issues raised in the Examiner's notes were addressed in the form of declarations that were floating around with Fed Ex. The matter was continued to April 5, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an amended petition or a supplement to the petition (to be determined).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (101 Campbell Avenue)
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for and with Roseller Abellan.

The sale was confirmed at $303,000.00. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order). An additional bond in the amount of $150,000.00 is required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung and Deputy Neu.

(May 7, 2010 Blocked account required in lieu of bond pursuant to ex parte order)

Petition For Injunctive Relief And Application For Temporary Restraining Order, For Contempt Of Court And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for the Petitioner.

No other party appeared on this matter. Mr. Lieberman stated that he complied with the direction of the Court. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

Petition For Injunctive Relief And Application For Temporary Restraining Order, For Contempt Of Court And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Continued To Nov-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for Roseller Abellan.

Mr. Lieberman stated that notice had not been posted on the property. The Court order Mr. Lieberman to post notice on the property, at the courthouse, and to serve by mail. Mr. Lieberman stated he was still attempting personal service. The matter was continued to November 5, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition For Injunctive Relief And Application For Temporary Restraining Order, For Contempt Of Court And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Continued To Oct-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for petitioner.

Mr. Lieberman stated that he was unable to serve the respondent's and that they were avoiding service. The Court will allow Mr. Lieberman to perform service by posting notice. The matter was continued to October 1, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition For Injunctive Relief And Application For Temporary Restraining Order, For Contempt Of Court And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Continued To Aug-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for Roseller Abellan. Rocky Ortega for Rizalina Abellan.

Mr. Lieberman stated that Mr. Ortega was specially appearing for Rizalina only, not the four Brothers and that the restraining order had already been issued to her. In addition, he stated that he was not able to serve the Brothers. Mr. Ortega stated that he needed clarification as to who he was represented and that he would receive notice if hired. The matter was continued to August 27, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bonner.

Petition For Injunctive Relief And Application For Temporary Restraining Order, For Contempt Of Court And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-18-2008 Continued To Jul-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman for the Petitioner.

Mr. Lieberman stated that notice of the hearing was not personally served as he was not aware that personal service was required. The Court will issue the Temporary Restraining Order (TRO) as to Rizalina Abellan. Mr. Leiberman will prepare the TRO. The matter regarding the Contempt of Court issue was continued to July 30, 2008 for notice to be properly served.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith and A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Possession Of Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: GARY LIEBERMAN, APPEARING FOR AND WITH ROSELLER ABELLAN, ALSO APPEARING ROBERTO, ROMEO AND DAVID ABELLAN BROTHERS OF THE PETITIONER.

COUNSEL WISHES TO TAKE POCESSION OF THE REAL PROPERTY BUT THE BROTHERS ARE STILL OCCUPYING IT. COUNSEL ALSO STATES THAT THE CITATION WERE PROPERLY SERVED. THE COURT ASK THE BROTHERS WHY DON'T THEY MOVE OUT. THEY ALL STATED THAT THEY HAVE MADE REPAIRS ON THE PROPERTY, BEEN PAY MORTGAGE ECT. AND FELT THAT MR. LIEBERMAN HAD NO RIGHT IT ASK THEM TO MOVE. THE COURT INSTRUCTS COUNSEL TO START THE PROCESS IN ORDER TO GET POCCESSION OF THE REAL PROPERTY.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL,CAR#2542, CLERK: LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:M. LOOS

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Possession Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Continued To Aug-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Lieberman (Counsel for Roseller Abellan, Personal Representative).

Mr. Lieberman advised the Court that due to service of process issues, he would need additional time to report on the status of the real property whereupon the Court granted a continuance to August 14, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Larry Thompson; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

Petn. For An Order To Deliver Possession Of Real Property, For Issuance Of Citation For Examination Re: Property
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Gary Lieberman appearing for petitioner. Roberto Abellan and Romeo Abellan are in court. They are objecting to the sale. Court indicated they are too late to object to the sale. Sale is confirmed at $101,000.00. Additional bond in the amount of $85,000.00 is required. Counsel will submit order with bond.
Petition for an order to deliver possession of real property is granted. Order signed. Status on possession of real property is set on 6/5. Court advised the objectors to get a lawyer.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.
